blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,752 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 1.3" of snow, highs of 33°F, gusts to 42 mph.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
